name: Checkbox
description: Standalone checkbox control. 2 sizes, checked/indeterminate, disabled. Unchecked renders as a colored ring behind a smaller white inset box; checked/indeterminate is a solid filled square with a white check/dash.
sourceNote: Figma's 'Focused' variant recolors the ring to primary-base; this component instead uses the standard system :focus-visible ring for consistency with every other interactive component.

state.description: Forces a visual state for design QA. Leave unset in real usage.
